nasb.text: The woman conceived and bore a son at that season the next year, as Elisha had said to her.

esv.text: But the woman conceived, and she bore a son about that time the following spring, as Elisha had said to her.

cnv.text: 這婦人果然懷了孕，到明年這個時分，時候到了，她就生了一個兒子，正如以利沙對她所說的。

ccb.text: 那妇人果然怀了孕，在第二年的那时候生了一个儿子，应验了以利沙对她说的话。
